title: Sinusitis
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Sinusitis means the sinuses are inflamed.
Symptoms can include cough, congestion, fatigue, fever, and postnasal drainage.
Clinicians diagnose sinusitis using symptoms and examination.
Supportive measures can include saline sprays, vaporizers, heat, and pain relievers.
